offer: For property managers handling 5–15 rental listings/month, inefficient management causes late tenant responses. We streamline tenant applications instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient management of tenant applications and property listings
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try tenant application management on 1-3 listings
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing tenant data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
